title: Emergency Fund
goalDescription: Building a cash cushion for unexpected expenses — job loss, medical bills, or urgent repairs.
resultIntro: Based on your expenses, here's a starting point for building your emergency fund.

questions.label: Monthly essential expenses
questions.help: Rent, food, transport, and utilities — what you'd need to cover if your income stopped.

questions.label: Months of expenses you want covered
Amount already saved toward this fund
Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: Leave at 0% if this will sit in a regular savings account rather than an interest-bearing one.
